The '''Saffa''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] that were responsible for the development of an important form of art, the [[Saffa paintings]], after making contact with the [[Thennqora]]. The Saffa painting reached its height approximately [[2219 BBY|2219]]-[[1569 BBY]].

{{Species-stub}}
